title: Your page, done properly
checkLabels.t4: There must be an encoding in head
checkLabels.t5: There must be a title with text
checkLabels.t6: There must be a heading with text
checkLabels.t7: There must be a sentence with text
why.empty: It is empty. There is no skeleton to copy. Write it from scratch — you know everything you need.
why.not-closed: A tag is open and never closed, or closed in the wrong order.
why.no-doctype: There is no DOCTYPE. The first line of the file.
why.no-lang: There is no lang, or it is empty. A screen reader does not know how to pronounce the text.
why.no-charset: There is no encoding in head. Non-English letters will break on someone else's computer.
why.no-title: There is no title, or it is empty. The tab will stay nameless.
why.no-heading: There is no heading with text in it.
why.no-p: There is no sentence with text in it.
hint2.empty: Start from DOCTYPE. Then <html>. Then the head. Then the body. Line by line.
hint3.empty: If you are frozen — write the first line. Then the next. Do not look at the whole skeleton at once.
hint2.not-closed: Go top to bottom, tag by tag. Every opening tag is looking for its closing one.
hint2.no-doctype: <!DOCTYPE html> is the first line. Before <html>, not inside it.
hint2.no-lang: lang goes INSIDE the opening tag: <html lang="en">.
hint2.no-charset: The encoding is a meta tag inside <head>. It has no closing tag.
hint2.no-title: <title> goes in <head>. There must be text between the tags.
hint2.no-heading: The heading goes in <body>. Wrap your topic in <h1>.
hint2.no-p:
The sentence goes in , under the heading. Wrap it in

.
blocks.0.text: The editor is empty for the second time. This time you know more.
blocks.2.text: Build it again, but properly: DOCTYPE, wrapper, head with a name and an encoding, body with a heading and a sentence.
blocks.3.text: No skeleton to copy. No example on the right. Write it from scratch.
blocks.5.text: Do not look at the whole skeleton at once. Write the first line. Then the next. Then the third. Code gets built line by line, not in your head.
blocks.6.text: "You will freeze. The empty file does that to everyone, including people who have been doing this for twenty years. The difference is that now you know what to do with that feeling."
